name: accounting firms processing 10–20 expense reports/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual formatting causes delays in reimbursements. We convert raw expense reports into formatted reimbursement summaries instead of manual formatting of expense reports.
problem_solved: Manual formatting of expense reports leads to delays in reimbursements.
features: manual data entry for expense reports
